'''Worru'du''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Worru'du system/Legends|Worru'du system]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] and known for its [[Grass/Legends|grass]] fields. The grass from Worru'du could be used for basket weaving.

==Appearances==
*''[[Galaxy of Fear: The Nightmare Machine]]'' {{1stm}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2009-08-18 -->''[[The Essential Atlas]]''
